payload.title: [HIGH] Cross-account API-key revoke (IDOR)
payload.description: DELETE /auth/keys/:id (src/auth_hosted/cloud-auth.js:336) calls revokeApiKey(pool, req.params.id) with no ownership check; revokeApiKey (apikeys.js:115) UPDATEs WHERE id=$1 only. Key ids are the public half of every sk_ key. Any authenticated account revokes any other account's keys -> cross-tenant credential DoS. FIX: scope to WHERE id=$1 AND account_id=$2 (req.principal.accountId); 404 on rowCount 0.
